rationale: The cited paper models within-site web browsing dynamics (type II tobit on clickstream page requests/durations), while the citing paper studies buyer-level dealer distribution intensity and new-car make choice using geocoded transaction data and a hierarchical Bayes conditional logit—there is no clear overlap in focal constructs or core method use from the notes.
